title: 70-lesson milestone: speed gate
description: Speed gate at lesson 70 — must hold 70 WPM to pass
text: Seventy lessons. Numbers do not lie — your fingers move faster than ever. The keyboard is now an extension of your thoughts, not an obstacle. Keep training; the last thirty lessons will turn this speed into automatic, lifelong muscle memory.

tips.text: If you pass this gate, you're objectively fast

tips.target: Seventy lessons. Numbers do not lie — your fingers move faster than ever. The keyboard is now an extension of

tips.text: Last 30 lessons take you to 95-100 WPM if you stay consistent

character_tips.anna: 🎯 70 WPM gate. If you pass here, you're officially fast. Top 15% of all typists.
character_tips.maxim: 70 WPM is the professional threshold. Many writers never get past 60.
character_tips.knopych: 70 WPM BOSS DEFEATED! 🏆 PRO LEVEL UNLOCKED!
